notes: Best-of-N on top of exp_009 GRPO model. NUM_SAMPLES=3 at T=0.6 — notebook's majority_vote picks the modal boxed answer per question. Attacks 16.3% missing_boxed failures (one of 3 samples likely emits a proper box). max_num_seqs dropped 32→12 to fit 3x KV cache on T4 x2. Expected runtime ~6-8 hr on T4 x2; if it overruns the 9hr Kaggle limit, drop to num_samples=2.
